task_completion.description: Verify that the agent has successfully logged into the Sentrifugo application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sentrifugo dashboard or Holiday Management module is visible in the web browser.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Texas Plant Holidays' group has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Texas Plant Holidays' group is visible in the Holiday Groups list or a dropdown menu in Sentrifugo.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 2026 holidays for the Texas Plant have been added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Holidays list shows holidays for 2026 assigned to the 'Texas Plant Holidays' group. Look specifically for the unique inclusion of Juneteenth on 2026-06-19.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'California Plant Holidays' group has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'California Plant Holidays' group is visible in the Holiday Groups list or a dropdown menu in Sentrifugo.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 2026 holidays for the California Plant have been added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Holidays list shows holidays for 2026 assigned to the 'California Plant Holidays' group. Look specifically for the unique inclusion of César Chávez Day on 2026-03-31.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Pennsylvania Plant Holidays' group has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Pennsylvania Plant Holidays' group is visible in the Holiday Groups list or a dropdown menu in Sentrifugo.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 2026 holidays for the Pennsylvania Plant have been added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Holidays list shows holidays for 2026 assigned to the 'Pennsylvania Plant Holidays' group. Look specifically for the unique inclusion of Presidents' Day on 2026-02-16.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Sentrifugo web interface to configure the holidays.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Sentrifugo web UI (forms, buttons, lists) rather than terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually entered the data into the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The holiday data should be visible within the Sentrifugo application's tables or forms, not just viewed in the source text file or a separate text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI by directly manipulating the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing MySQL or other database commands being executed to insert the holidays.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected holiday groups are 'Texas Plant Holidays', 'California Plant Holidays', and 'Pennsylvania Plant Holidays'. All groups share these 2026 holidays: New Year's Day (2026-01-01), Memorial Day (2026-05-25), Independence Day (2026-07-03), Labor Day (2026-09-07), Thanksgiving Day (2026-11-26), and Christmas Day (2026-12-25). Unique holidays per group: Texas includes Juneteenth (2026-06-19); California includes César Chávez Day (2026-03-31); Pennsylvania includes Presidents' Day (2026-02-16).
